scripts.test:node: npm run write:version && node --test tests/course-logic.test.js tests/resource-check.test.js tests/notes-contract.test.js tests/course-notes-refresh.test.js tests/gist-removal.contract.test.js tests/feedback-widget.test.js tests/feedback-context.contract.test.js tests/course-shell-ui.test.js tests/version.contract.test.js && node --test tests/course-data.test.js

scripts.test: npm run test:node && npm run test:smoke
